query:
SELECT DISTINCT
  b.id as bloco_id,
  b.nome as bloco_nome,
  m.id as macro_id,
  m.nome as macro_nome,
  mi.id as micro_id,
  mi.nome as micro_nome,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) as total_acoes
FROM blocos b
LEFT JOIN macros m ON b.id = m.blocoId
LEFT JOIN micros mi ON m.id = mi.macroId
LEFT JOIN actions a ON mi.id = a.microId
WHERE a.id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY b.id, b.nome, m.id, m.nome, mi.id, mi.nome
ORDER BY b.nome, m.nome, mi.nome;
